data.title: NASA seeks early career and senior scientists for prestigious fellowships at its U.S. locations. Deadline: March 1, 2026. Apply for NASA Postdoctoral Program through ORAU.
data.description: In Oak Ridge, Tennessee, NASA is welcoming scientists at various career stages to consider fellowship positions in its postdoctoral program, aimed at foster advancements in science, technology, aeronautics, and space exploration. The application deadline for this fellowship cycle is March 1, 2026. Interested individuals can find out more information or submit their applications for fellowships in the NASA Postdoctoral Program (NPP). The NPP is overseen by ORAU on behalf of NASA, providing valuable scientific and technological opportunities for selected fellows.

data.title: Dow Jones up after surprise jobs report, Trump tariff ruling postponed, Intel stock soars. Oklo surges.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced gains following an unexpected rise in job numbers. The decision on Trump's tariffs was delayed, leading to a surge in Oklo stocks. The stock market saw positive movement today, with the Dow rising after the surprising job data and Intel also witnessing significant growth due to Trump's statements.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin supports convicted dev Roman Storm, stating privacy tools as essential for protection.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, one of the creators of Ethereum, recently voiced his support for Roman Storm, the developer of Tornado Cash, despite Storm's previous legal troubles. Buterin emphasized the importance of privacy tools like Tornado Cash, asserting that they are essential for safeguarding individuals' rights. This endorsement comes as a significant move, considering the ongoing debate surrounding privacy and security in the cryptocurrency space. The support from Buterin could potentially boost the reputation of Tornado Cash, which has faced scrutiny in the past. Overall, Buterin's backing of Storm highlights the increasing recognition of privacy as a fundamental human right in the digital age.

data.title: CN sets new grain movement record, moving 2.82M metric tonnes in December, 80K more than in 2020.
data.description: In Montreal on January 9, 2026, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) revealed a milestone in grain movement. December saw CN achieve a new record for the fourth month in a row, moving 2.82 million metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada. This surpassed the previous December record set in 2020 by more than 80,000 metric tonnes.

data.title: ECP sells Symmetry Energy Solutions to NextEra Energy Resources, serving 5,500 commercial customers and 80,000 residential/commercial customers.
data.description: In Summit, New Jersey, Energy Capital Partners (ECP), a prominent investment firm in energy transition infrastructure, has recently finalized the sale of Symmetry Energy Solutions to NextEra Energy Resources, LLC, a subsidiary of NextEra Energy, Inc. Symmetry, a company specializing in national natural gas supply, logistics, and asset management, caters to around 5,500 large commercial and industrial clients, along with over 80,000 residential and small commercial customers. This transaction marks a significant development in the energy sector.

data.title: Dow futures up, S&P 500 and Nasdaq slip as ADP jobs data signals modest rebound. ADP data shows 41,000 jobs added. AAR Corp. stocks rise 5.07% after strong sales forecast.
data.description: U.S. stock futures were mixed after a higher close on Tuesday, with major benchmark indices showing varied movement. Private-sector hiring in December saw companies adding 41,000 jobs, a positive turn from the previous month's loss of 29,000, but slower than expected. The Dow Jones surged 1% to record peaks during Tuesday's trading. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.15%, while the two-year bond stood at 3.46%. The Federal Reserve is expected to keep interest rates unchanged in January, with an 83.9% likelihood as per CME Group's FedWatch tool. Futures for Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 showed mixed changes. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were down in premarket trading. AAR Corp. saw a 5.07% increase after strong second-quarter results and a positive sales forecast for the current quarter. The stock maintained a strong price trend based on Benzinga's Edge Stock Rankings.

data.title: Private hiring rebounded in December with 41,000 new jobs, but below expectations. Service-providing industries saw most gains.
data.description: In December 2025, private-sector hiring in the U.S. experienced a rebound with a gain of 41,000 jobs, following a revised loss of 29,000 jobs in November. This data, from the latest National Employment Report by ADP, fell short of economists' expectations for a 47,000 increase. The report highlighted a disparity in labor demand among different sizes of firms, as small establishments saw positive end-of-year hiring while large employers scaled back. The service-providing industries were the main contributors to the job gains in December, adding 44,000 positions. Specifically, education and health services led with 39,000 jobs, followed by leisure and hospitality with 24,000. Additionally, trade, transportation, and utilities added 11,000 jobs. However, professional and business services experienced a loss of 29,000 jobs during this period.

data.title: US is using Venezuelan crude as a geopolitical weapon, experts speculate on potential global supply impact. Trump aims to control oil flows with 30-50 million barrels transfer.
data.description: The capture of former Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro has raised questions about whether Venezuelan oil will return to global markets, potentially lowering crude prices. While many on Wall Street believe this could happen due to an already well-stocked market, energy strategist Jeff Krimmel of Krimmel Strategy Group disagrees. He anticipates U.S. export restrictions to tightly control Venezuelan supply for political leverage. Krimmel suggests this could lead to a regionalization of global oil trade, with barrels staying within their respective hemispheres. President Trump stated that interim authorities in Caracas agreed to transfer between 30 million and 50 million barrels of sanctioned oil.

data.title: Fortrea (Nasdaq: FTRE) reschedules presentation to 11:15 am on Jan 13, 2026 at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.
data.description: Fortrea, a prominent global contract research organization trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol FTRE, has rescheduled their presentation at the J.P. Morgan Annual Healthcare Conference in San Francisco. The new presentation time is set for 11:15 am PST on Tuesday, January 13, 2026.

data.description: St. Petersburg, Florida, January 9, 2026 – A leading ranking authority, U.S. News & World Report, recently announced Tin Leg, a brand under Squaremouth, as one of the Best Travel Insurance Companies for 2026. Tin Leg excelled in multiple categories, including being recognized for offering the Most Affordable travel insurance plans.
